title: 'It's a real issue' - who is the back-up to Lucy Bronze?
summary: England women's football faces a significant challenge finding a backup and eventual successor to defender Lucy Bronze. Analysts including Alex Scott and Steph Houghton discuss the lack of suitable candidates for this critical position.
content: Alex Scott, Fara Williams, Ellen White and Steph Houghton discuss the challenge England face in finding a back-up and eventual successor to Lucy Bronze.

zh.title: "这是个真实问题" - 谁是露西·布朗的替补？
zh.summary: 英格兰女足面临着为后卫露西·布朗寻找替补和最终继任者的重大挑战。包括亚历克斯·斯科特和史蒂芬·霍顿在内的分析人士讨论了这个关键位置缺乏合适人选的问题。

title: Adjusting ESPN's World Cup kit ranks as new jerseys get released
summary: The 2026 World Cup expands to 48 teams, bringing 96 national kits to the tournament. ESPN ranks the newly released jerseys from worst to first.
content: The 2026 World Cup will be the first with 48 teams. That means there'll be 96 kits on show! Here are all the ones released so far, from worst to first.

zh.title: 新球衣发布，ESPN调整世界杯球衣排名
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯扩展至48支球队，为锦标赛带来了96套国家队球衣。ESPN对新发布的球衣进行了从最差到最好的排名。

title: Yamal inspired by LeBron for UCL comeback
summary: Lamine Yamal is seeking inspiration from LeBron James to lead Barcelona to a Champions League quarterfinal comeback win against Atlético Madrid on Tuesday. This comeback attempt is significant for Barcelona's European aspirations.
content: Lamine Yamal is seeking inspiration from Lebron James as he attempts to lead Barcelona to a Champions League quarterfinal comeback win against Atlético Madrid on Tuesday.

zh.title: 亚马尔受勒布朗启发为欧冠复出而战
zh.summary: 拉米娜·亚马尔寻求从勒布朗·詹姆斯获得灵感，以领导巴塞罗那在周二对阵马德里竞技的欧冠四分之一决赛中实现逆转胜利。这场复出尝试对巴塞罗那的欧洲抱负意义重大。

title: Leeds get 'crunch-time' win amid relegation fight
summary: Leeds United climbed six points clear of the relegation zone with a 2-1 victory over Manchester United at Old Trafford, securing their second away win of the season and first at the historic venue. This crucial win significantly improves their Premier League survival chances.
content: Leeds United climbed six points clear of the relegation zone after their second away win of the season and their first in the Premier League at Old Trafford with a 2-1 "crunch-time" victory over Manchester United.

zh.title: 利兹联赛在保级斗争中取得"关键时刻"胜利
zh.summary: 利兹联队以2-1战胜曼联在老特拉福德球场，领先降级区6分，这是他们本赛季的第二场客场胜利，也是在这个历史悠久的场地的首场胜利。这场关键胜利大大提高了他们的英超保级机会。

title: Carrick slams 'shocking' Martinez red card in loss
summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick criticized the red card given to Lisandro Martinez during their 2-1 loss to Leeds, calling it one of the worst decisions he's witnessed. The controversial dismissal had a pivotal impact on the match outcome.
content: Michael Carrick has labeled the decision to send off Lisandro Martinez in Manchester United's shock 1-2 defeat by Leeds United on Monday night as one of the worst he's ever seen.

zh.title: 卡里克猛烈抨击"令人震惊的"马丁内斯红牌被罚
zh.summary: 曼联主教练迈克尔·卡里克批评了李桑德罗·马丁内斯在他们1-2不敌利兹联的比赛中被罚红牌的决定，称其为他见过最糟糕的判罚之一。这张有争议的红牌对比赛结果产生了重大影响。

title: Ghana hires Queiroz ahead of World Cup campaign
summary: Ghana have appointed Carlos Queiroz as head coach of their senior national team to lead their 2026 World Cup campaign. This appointment represents a significant step in Ghana's tournament preparation.
content: Ghana have appointed Carlos Queiroz as head coach of the senior national team ahead of their participation in the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 加纳聘请奎罗斯备战世界杯
zh.summary: 加纳已任命卡洛斯·奎罗斯担任国家队主教练,领导其2026年世界杯运动。这次任命代表了加纳在锦标赛准备中的重要一步。

title: Iran's Traktor lands in Jeddah for ACL round of 16
summary: Iranian club Traktor arrived in Saudi Arabia to compete in the AFC Champions League Elite round of 16, continuing their participation despite the Middle East conflict. The team's presence underscores football's role in maintaining international sporting competition.
content: Iranian club Tractor arrived in Saudi Arabia amid the war in the Middle East and confirmed Monday it will play in the AFC Champions League Elite round of 16.

zh.title: 伊朗塔拉克托队抵达吉达参加亚冠16强赛
zh.summary: 伊朗俱乐部塔拉克托队抵达沙特阿拉伯参加亚冠精英联赛16强比赛,尽管中东冲突仍继续参赛。该队的出现突显了足球在维持国际体育竞争中的作用。

title: Luis Enrique warns PSG of 'trap' against Liverpool
summary: PSG head coach Luis Enrique warned his squad against complacency in the UEFA Champions League second leg against Liverpool, despite their convincing first-leg victory at home. The caution highlights the unpredictability of European knockout football.
content: Paris Saint-Germain head coach Luis Enrique has warned his players not to fall into a "trap" in the second leg of their UEFA Champions League clash with Liverpool, despite having comprehensively beaten Arne Slot's side at the Parc des Princes last week.

zh.title: 路易斯·恩里克警告巴黎圣日耳曼谨防利物浦的"陷阱"
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼主教练路易斯·恩里克警告球队在欧冠次回合对阵利物浦时不要自满,尽管他们主场首回合获胜轻松。这一警告突显了欧洲淘汰赛足球的不可预测性。

title: Szoboszlai apologizes for confrontation with fans
summary: Liverpool's Dominik Szoboszlai apologized for appearing to confront supporters following the team's 4-0 defeat to Manchester City, describing the incident as a misunderstanding. The apology seeks to ease tensions after an emotional loss.
content: Dominik Szoboszlai has apologised to Liverpool supporters for appearing to confront them after the team's 4-0 defeat to Manchester City last weekend, describing the incident as a "misunderstanding".

zh.title: 萨博斯洛伊为与球迷对抗道歉
zh.summary: 利物浦球员多米尼克·萨博斯洛伊在球队以0-4惨败曼城后为与球迷的对抗道歉，他将此事件描述为误会。这个道歉旨在在这场情感激烈的失利后缓解紧张气氛。

title: 🍼 Bottle job? Fan celebrates with Arsenal taunt
summary: Manchester City are narrowing the gap with Arsenal in a competitive Premier League title race, with City fans expressing confidence in their team's position. The rivalry intensifies as both teams battle for the championship.
content: Manchester City are closing in on Arsenal in a gripping Premier League title race -- and their fans know it.

zh.title: 🍼 失利？球迷用阿森纳的嘲笑庆祝
zh.summary: 曼城在激烈的英超争冠竞争中缩小与阿森纳的差距，城市球迷对自己球队的地位充满信心。随着两队争夺冠军，竞争变得更加激烈。

title: Are Manchester United back? Leeds' performance suggests they're not
summary: Leeds United's 2-1 victory over Manchester United at Old Trafford raises questions about United's form and title credentials as the season reaches its final stages. The result suggests significant work remains for Carrick's side to compete at the highest level.
content: Leeds United's win over Manchester United at Old Trafford has left Michael Carrick's side wondering how much better can they get to finish off the Premier League season.

zh.title: 曼联回来了吗？利兹的表现表明并没有
zh.summary: 利兹联在老特拉福德球场以2-1击败曼联，在赛季最后阶段引发了对曼联状态和争冠资格的质疑。这个结果表明卡里克的球队仍需做大量工作才能在最高水平竞争。
